description: Pins the shared config_id/interface_id positive-int rejections and the config-interface update PUT body. linode_id and no-fields rejection text diverges (see report).

cases.name: rejects non-positive config_id
cases.expect_error: config_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: rejects non-positive interface_id
cases.expect_error: interface_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: updates a config interface primary flag
requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a network interface on the configuration profile. Set confirm=true to proceed.
